turn-27-reveal.text: Words ending in 'e' can be masculine or feminine. For example, 'carne' (meat) is feminine.

turn-29-prompt.text: How do you say 'I don't eat meat'?

turn-31-prompt.text: How would you say 'I don't eat meat and I don't drink alcohol'?

turn-33-full.text: No como carne y no tomo alcohol.

outro-1-full.text: You've learned the irregular verb 'ir' and its conjugations. Practice using them in sentences to describe actions.

outro-2-full.text: Remember, nouns ending in 'e' can be masculine or feminine. Use context to determine gender.

outro-3-full.text: Try creating your own sentences using 'ir' and other verbs you've learned.
